creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
itetcu      2011-08-02 17:05:43 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    sysutils/nut         Makefile distinfo pkg-plist 
    sysutils/nut/files   nut.sh.in nut_upsmon.sh.in 
  Added files:
    sysutils/nut/files   patch-clients__Makefile.in 
                         patch-data__html__Makefile.in 
  Removed files:
    sysutils/nut/files   extra-patch-m4_nut_check_libusb.m4 
                         patch-clients-Makefile.in 
                         patch-clients-upssched.c 
                         patch-data-html-Makefile.in 
                         patch-m4-nut_check_ipv6.m4 
  Log:
  Update to 2.6.1. Main changes:
  - IPv6 always compiled in (drop IPV6 option)
  - megatec and megatec_usb drivers replaced by blazer_ser and blazer_usb.
  - liebertgxt2 renamed to liebert-esp2
  - s/PREFIX/LOCALBASE/ for gd includes/libs (grrr!)
  - add OPTIONal bash completion
  
  PR:             152866 [1], 157925 [2],
  Submitted by:   John Bayly <freebsd.ports@tipstrade.net> [1], lev@ [2]
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.62      +29 -26    ports/sysutils/nut/Makefile
  1.28      +4 -4      ports/sysutils/nut/distinfo

  1.3       +7 -1      ports/sysutils/nut/files/nut.sh.in
  1.3       +7 -1      ports/sysutils/nut/files/nut_upsmon.sh.in
  1.3       +0 -11     ports/sysutils/nut/files/patch-clients-Makefile.in (dead)

  1.1       +11 -0     ports/sysutils/nut/files/patch-clients__Makefile.in (new)
  1.3       +0 -20     ports/sysutils/nut/files/patch-data-html-Makefile.in (dead)
  1.1       +20 -0     ports/sysutils/nut/files/patch-data__html__Makefile.in (new)
  1.2       +0 -13     ports/sysutils/nut/files/patch-m4-nut_check_ipv6.m4 (dead)
  1.32      +8 -4      ports/sysutils/nut/pkg-plist
